site.name: Teeraphat Jirapasnitilert
site.intro: Full-stack developer specializing in scalable web applications and secure system design. I help turn complex business processes into reliable, production-ready solutions, with hands-on experience delivering real-world projects for industry clients.
site.summary: I focus on turning real business problems into practical digital solutions. In a recent project, I developed an end-to-end system to automate document workflows—such as invoices, quotations, and payroll—reducing manual effort and errors. I also built an OCR-powered pipeline to extract data from purchase order PDFs, enabling automatic form population and significantly improving efficiency.

strengths.title: Full-stack Web Development
strengths.description: Develop scalable, production-grade web applications with a focus on maintainability, performance, and robust system architecture.

strengths.title: Cybersecurity
strengths.description: Secure authentication with JWT & NextAuth, including session management and access control.

strengths.title: System Design
strengths.description: Specialized in transforming business challenges into efficient digital solutions. Developed end-to-end systems to automate document workflows

certificates.title: Certiport IT Specialist Cybersecurity

certificates.title: Gold Medal: The Best Presentation Award
certificates.note: Gold Medal: The Best Presentation Award from the Science Exhibition Day 2026 Project, KMUTNB, for the research Steel Work Management System.

projects.name: Integrated Steel Business Management System
projects.description: A full-stack web application for managing make-to-order steel business workflows and replacing paper and Excel based processes.
highlights: Financial automation for invoices, receipts, billing statements, and quotations.
AI assisted data entry using OCR combined with an LLM to extract PO data into structured JSON.
Role based access control for 6 roles, plus payroll, inventory, and financial reporting modules.

projects.name: Thai PDF OCR API
projects.description: A specialized OCR and AI-powered REST API for extracting and converting Purchase Order (PO) data from various PDF formats into structured JSON, supporting both digital and scanned documents.
highlights: Extracts Purchase Order (PO) data from both scanned and digital PDFs.
Uses a smart pipeline with automatic fallback from text extraction to OCR.
Transforms unstructured PO text into structured JSON using LLM.
Captures key fields such as header, customer info, and item details.
Provides metadata including extraction method, page count, and processing time.

projects.name: AppCS - Computer Science Faculty Application
projects.description: A mobile application for the Faculty of Computer Science (KMUTNB) designed to streamline communication, announcements, and access to student services for students, faculty, and staff.
highlights: Provides centralized access to faculty news, announcements, and service links.
Supports student services such as schedules, exams, and advisor information.
Implements role-based access control (RBAC) for staff content management.
Enables secure communication via HTTPS with validated server-side input.
Designed for multi-role usage including students, faculty, and staff.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained frontend features for internal systems and client facing production applications.
Improved UI components and resolved critical bugs tracked via Jira.
Collaborated within an Agile team to ensure continuous delivery of system features and updates.
Integrated frontend components with backend APIs and supported minor backend tasks, including API adjustments and data management.
Analyzed and optimized UI and UX to enhance performance and overall user experience.
Coordinated closely with design and backend teams to ensure cross system consistency.

experience.role: Full-stack Developer (Industry Collaboration - University Senior Project)
responsibilities: Delivered a university senior project in collaboration with a business client, developing a full-stack system for real operational use.
Worked directly with stakeholders to gather requirements and iteratively refine features through sprint-based development.
Digitized make-to-order workflows, replacing manual and Excel-based processes with a web application.
Built an OCR and AI pipeline to extract Purchase Order (PO) data into structured JSON.
Developed financial document modules including invoices, receipts, and quotations.
Deployed and validated the system in real usage scenarios with continuous feedback from the client.
Received Best Presentation Award at Science Exhibition Day 2026.

education.school: King Mongkut's University of Technology North Bangkok (KMUTNB)
